claim: Tier 7.7v-r0 extends tier7_7j.basis_features with random_recurrent and shuffled_input diagnostic modes, declares 6 variant registry entries (orthogonal, block, frozen_recurrent, shuffled_input, no_plasticity, state_reset), and verifies all variants produce state geometry with distinct participation ratios. This provides the infrastructure needed for Tier 7.7u causal localization probes.
caveat: Model variant implementation and verification only; not a repair, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, and not hardware/native transfer.
